offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/month, data discrepancies cause processing delays. We streamline reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: delays in claims processing due to data reconciliation issues
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters

Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
